obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (arr : Arr), arr ≠ [] → ∃ (i j : Nat), i ≤ j ∧ j ≤ arr.length ∧ i < j ∧ sliceSum arr i j = maxSubarray arr
obligations.nl_gloss: For any non-empty input, there exists a contiguous non-empty subslice whose sum equals the returned maximum.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (arr : Arr) (i j : Nat), arr ≠ [] → i < j → j ≤ arr.length → sliceSum arr i j ≤ maxSubarray arr
obligations.nl_gloss: For any non-empty input, no contiguous non-empty subslice has a sum strictly greater than the returned maximum.
